description: Searches for packages, options, programs, or flakes in the NixOS ecosystem by keyword and channel.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (optional, default: 20)

returns.description: A list of matching packages, options, programs, or flakes with descriptions.

description: Provides detailed information on a NixOS package or option by name and channel.

returns.description: Detailed metadata for the package or option, including its description, attributes, and usage.

description: Lists all available NixOS channels with version and availability status.

returns.description: A list of channels, their names, versions, and status.

description: Returns statistics about the selected NixOS channel, including package and option counts.

returns.description: Statistics with package count, option count, and summary data.

description: Provides statistics about the NixOS flakes index, including total packages, repositories, and contributors.

returns.description: Flake statistics and data on indexed packages and top contributors.

description: Searches for NixOS flakes by name, description, owner, or repository.

returns.description: List of matching flakes with package names and metadata.

description: Fetches version history and commit hashes for a NixOS package from NixHub.io for reproducible builds.

limit.description: Maximum number of versions to return (optional, default: 10)

returns.description: Version history and commit hashes for the package.

description: Finds a specific version of a NixOS package, including commit hash for reproducible builds.

returns.description: Details for the requested package version and commit hash.

description: Searches Home Manager configuration options using keywords in name or description.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (optional, default: 20)

returns.description: List of matching Home Manager options with type and description.

description: Shows details of a specific Home Manager option by exact name match.

name.description: Exact name of the Home Manager option

returns.description: Option details including type, description, and suggestions if not found.

description: Returns statistics about all Home Manager options and categories.

returns.description: Summary statistics with total options and top categories.

description: Lists all Home Manager option categories with option counts.

returns.description: Alphabetical list of option categories and their sizes.

description: Lists all Home Manager options matching a category or prefix.

returns.description: Options under the given prefix/category, with descriptions.

description: Searches available nix-darwin (macOS) options by name or description.

returns.description: List of matching nix-darwin options with type and description.

description: Shows details of a specific nix-darwin option by its exact name.

name.description: Exact name of the darwin option

returns.description: Option details including type, description, and suggestions.

description: Returns overall statistics about nix-darwin options and categories.

returns.description: Statistics including total options, categories, and top 5 categories.

description: Lists all top-level nix-darwin option categories, sorted alphabetically with counts.

returns.description: List of option categories and sizes.

description: Lists nix-darwin options matching a given prefix or category.

returns.description: Options within the specified prefix/category, including descriptions.
